response.justification: Bogdan is a capable Staff/Senior Software Engineer with strong backend and distributed systems experience, but he falls significantly short of the executive requirements for this CTO role. The position mandates a seasoned engineering leader capable of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ and architecting production-grade, multi-agent AI fintech systems. Bogdan's background lacks organizational leadership, board-level communication, and deep architectural ownership of real-time credit and algorithmic trading systems.
strengths: Proven expertise in backend distributed systems, including high-throughput microservices and asynchronous I/O.
Recent hands-on individual contributor experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Familiarity with financial and pricing domains from engineering roles at RIDE Capital and Tencent.
concerns: Completely lacks the required 5+ years of senior technical leadership and executive management experience.
No track record of scaling engineering organizations, managing managers, or governing outsourced delivery partners.
Insufficient production experience architecting complex, multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes algorithmic financial decisioning.
